programmes.show_description: White Trash, Holy Rollers. With the Coopers facing judgement from the congregation in the wake of Georgie's pregnancy, Sheldon is distracted by the family drama. S5, Ep21
My Demon Bumps. Alyse suffers from a burning rash. Terry struggles with a painful butt cheek lipoma. James has 'demons' on his back that are ruining his life! S5, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta
programmes.show_description: Be Bold. Penny turns to her family, who dish out tough love and help her stand tall. Meanwhile, Sasha is looking for a pink dress to honour her mother's battle with breast cancer. S2, Ep7
Chuck's Story. Chuck weighs almost 700lbs and it has hindered every aspect of his life. Can Chuck take control and reclaim the life that's slipping through his fingers? S2, Ep4
Christina's Story. Christina hasn't left her house in two years due to her size. She's eaten herself into a state that will soon kill her, but can she make a dramatic change? S2, Ep5
Say Yes To The Dress At Home. Coronavirus has turned the bridal industry upside down, forcing Kleinfeld to shut its doors. Brides email Randy and the Kleinfeld team for support. S18, Ep12
We Don't Always Have A Say Yes. Kleinfeld looks different but the brides are back! Dance Moms' Kendall Vertes helps her sister find a dress, and Randy gets honest with his assistant. S19, Ep1
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Immaculate Deception. The prospect of an empty house for the weekend has Mike and Molly in a state of excitement. S5, Ep11
The World According To Peggy. When Peggy suddenly announces she's leaving her job, Molly scrambles to throw her a retirement party, but wonders just why Peggy is calling it quits. S5, Ep12
Buy The Book. It's an exciting new chapter in Molly's life as her book is finally released, but she soon becomes obsessively worried that no one will buy it. S5, Ep13
A God-Fearin' Baptist. George and Mary insist on meeting the new woman in Georgie's life, while Sheldon and Missy have suspicions about what's going on with their family. S5, Ep19
Uncle Sheldon. Despite the whole family trying to keep it a secret, Sheldon and Missy learn about Georgie's pregnancy. S5, Ep20
White Trash, Holy Rollers. With the Coopers facing judgement from the congregation in the wake of Georgie's pregnancy, Sheldon is distracted by the family drama. S5, Ep21
The Maternal Conclusion. Leonard is surprised when Beverly is kind to him on a visit, until he finds out the real reason she's there. Denise and Stuart overstay their welcome. S12, Ep22
The Change Constant. Everything changes as Amy and Sheldon await big news. Howard and Bernadette leave their kids, while Leonard and Penny keep a secret. S12, Ep23
The Stockholm Syndrome. Bernadette and Howard leave their kids, Penny and Leonard try to keep a secret, Sheldon and Amy stick together, and Raj makes a new friend. S12, Ep24
Pilot. Brilliant physicists Leonard and Sheldon meet new neighbour Penny, who shows them that although they're smart, they know very little about real life. S1, Ep1
The Big Bran Hypothesis. Leonard volunteers to sign for a package to make a good impression on Penny, but things go terribly awry when he enlists Sheldon for help. S1, Ep2
The Fuzzy Boots Corollary. Leonard is depressed to learn that Penny is dating someone. Encouraged by his friends and fellow scientists, he asks a colleague out on a date. S1, Ep3
The Luminous Fish Effect. Sheldon gets fired and explores what life has to offer outside physics, leaving Leonard to take drastic action to snap his friend out of his funk. S1, Ep4
The Hamburger Postulate. Fearing he's wasting his time on Penny, Leonard makes a connection with Leslie. Meanwhile, Sheldon frets over a change to his hamburger routine. S1, Ep5
What Ever Happened To Baby Peggy? Peggy's past proves to be fertile ground for Molly's second book, but the author discovers it's quite a chore to get her mother-in-law to fess up. S5, Ep14
Pie Fight. When Mike hits a personal best weight-loss goal, he makes the risky decision to indulge in a slice of pie. S5, Ep15
Cocktails And Calamine. Molly is nervous about Mike attending a celebratory party her publisher puts on for her and Peggy. S5, Ep16
A Clogged Pore. Sheldon struggles with the first signs of puberty while his parents hunt for new jobs, and Georgie and Meemaw take a business trip across the border. S5, Ep22
Pilot. Nine-year-old Sheldon learns that his high intelligence isn't always helpful growing up in East Texas, where church and football are king. S1, Ep1
Rockets, Dewey Decimal System. To appease his worried mother, Sheldon employs the techniques of a self-help book to try and make a friend. S1, Ep2
The Middle Earth Paradigm. Penny hosts a Halloween party, putting Leonard, Sheldon, Wolowitz and Koothrappali through a new test of their social skills. S1, Ep6
The Dumpling Paradox. When Wolowitz goes AWOL with one of her friends, Penny's recruited to fill in for him on the guys' Halo team. S1, Ep7
The Grasshopper Experiment. Raj's parents set him up on a blind date, and when he discovers he can talk to her, she shows interest in Sheldon. S1, Ep8
Cooper-Hofstadter Polarization. When they're invited to present at a physics conference, Sheldon's reluctance to share the credit leads to a tiff between him and Leonard. S1, Ep9
The Loobenfeld Decay. Leonard and Sheldon each lie to avoid hearing Penny sing in a production of Rent. However, Sheldon's lie becomes a bit too complicated. S1, Ep10
The Pancake Batter Anomaly. With his friends knowing how sour he acts when sick and avoiding him as a result, Sheldon is nursed by Penny, who hasn't a clue what she's in for. S1, Ep11
The Jerusalem Duality. With Sheldon rattled after meeting Dennis, a teen physicist who's smarter than he is, the rest of the guys search for a way to eliminate the threat. S1, Ep12
The Bat Jar Conjecture. Sheldon finds himself booted from the gang's Physics Bowl team and replaced with Leslie, so he forms his own team hoping to prove he's superior. S1, Ep13

programmes.show_name: New: The Cult Behind The Killer The Andrea Yates Story
programmes.show_description: Indoctrination. After Andrea Yates' horrifying act, her dark preoccupation emerges - a secretive cult, twisted teachings, and followers drawn into a web of control. S1, Ep1

programmes.show_name: New: The Cult Behind The Killer The Andrea Yates Story
programmes.show_description: The Horror Within. Woroniecki's followers seem trapped in isolation. His teachings twist salvation into submission, possibly leading to Andrea Yates' breaking point. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: New: The Cult Behind The Killer The Andrea Yates Story
programmes.show_description: Revelation. In the aftermath of the drownings, Woroniecki deflects blame onto Rusty. New insights reveal that his lessons influenced the outcome of Yates's trial. S1, Ep3
Troop Lipoma Hills. Krystal is a witch who wants to clear a curse of a cyst from her face. Keven wants a butt lipoma removed to get his bum back into a regular shape. S5, Ep12
Monster In The Mirror. J-Fab is the life of the party, but her shoulder bump is seriously cramping her style. Teresa's red face and bumpy nose make her feel like a monster. S5, Ep13
Paula's Story. Paula has had a tough life, and at over 600lbs, has built a physical wall around herself to push people away. But can shed the pounds and turn her life around? S2, Ep6
James' Story. 38-year-old James has lost both his father and sister to obesity-related issues. Now, at a staggering 650lbs, he is facing the exact same fate. S2, Ep7
I'm Going By The Feel. Shaela is blind, but she knows exactly what kind of dress she wants. Stacey is running out of time to find an awe-inspiring reception dress. S19, Ep2
My Husband And My Fiancee. Women in a throuple need dresses for their wedding. Plus, Ronnie has one more surprise for a COVID-19 frontline doctor who's getting married. S19, Ep3

Mudlick Or Bust. Molly surprises Peggy by reuniting her with her estranged sister, Rosemary, when they take a road trip to Peggy's hometown of Mudlick. S5, Ep17
No Kay Morale. When Peggy's depressed friend Kay returns to town, Molly is determined to find a way to lift her spirits. S5, Ep18
Mother From Another Mudlick. Mike meets his Aunt Rosemary for the first time and is instantly smitten by her warmth and positive attitude, which is the opposite of his mother. S5, Ep19
Poker, Faith And Eggs. When George Sr. is rushed to the emergency room, Meemaw comes to babysit. And the kids have an adventure getting to the hospital on their own. S1, Ep3
A Therapist, A Comic Book. Sheldon refuses to eat solid food after a choking scare but finds solace in a new interest after he discovers comic books. S1, Ep4
A Solar Calculator, A Game Ball. Sheldon uses his statistics skills to help his father coach the football team. Both Sheldon and Georgie struggle with the popularity this brings. S1, Ep5
The Nerdvana Annihilation. When the delivery of a full-size prop of 1960's 'The Time Machine' causes Penny to miss work, she scolds Leonard about his sci-fi collectibles. S1, Ep14
The Pork Chop Indeterminacy. The gang fall for Sheldon's twin sister, and Leonard's plan to win her heart is derailed when Sheldon declares he'll decide who can date her. S1, Ep15
The Peanut Reaction. Penny wants to throw a surprise party for Leonard, but Sheldon's indulgence at an electronics store throws her off-track. S1, Ep16
The Tangerine Factor. Penny's breakup spurs Leonard to summon the courage to ask her out, and they both go to Sheldon for advice on their upcoming date. S1, Ep17
The Bad Fish Paradigm. Penny opens up to Sheldon after a less-than-stellar first date with Leonard, placing him in the uncomfortable position of having to keep a secret. S2, Ep1
The Codpiece Topology. Seeing Penny with another guy sends Leonard back to Leslie Winkle, much to Sheldon's dismay. S2, Ep2
The Barbarian Sublimation. Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian and persistently pesters Sheldon for advice. S2, Ep3
The Griffin Equivalency. Full of confidence following being named one of People's 30 to Watch Under 30, Raj hits on Penny and becomes impossibly arrogant. S2, Ep4
Dara Ó Briain introduces topical chat and laugh out loud games with guests Rhys James, Ed Byrne, Glenn Moore, Sara Pascoe and Emmanuel Sonubi. S1, Ep5
When a mystery assassin starts killing the world's most beautiful people, former models Derek and Hansel must reclaim their fame and save the day.
